signals.headline: US–Iran ceasefire extended (April 22, 2026)** | **YES** | **MED** confidence
signals.raw:
US–Iran ceasefire extended (April 22, 2026)** | **YES** | **MED** confidence

Markets react positively as Wall Street indices rise on the extension, easing energy price pressures from the Iran war that drove March 2026 headline CPI to 3.3% y/y (up 0.9% m/m) and oil from $71 to $103/barrel[1][2][3].
